title: fix: push new Sweden Central gptimage secrets to gen worker
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- #12467 added the two Sweden Central Azure keys to sops secrets, but `push-generation-secrets.mjs`'s allowlist skipped them at deploy ("Skipping non-generation secrets")
- Deployed worker therefore 500s: `AZURE_MYCELI_PROD_IMG_MINI_SWEDEN_API_KEY not found in environment variables`
- Adds both keys to `REQUIRED_SECRET_KEYS`

Addresses #12446

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Sweden gets the keys
gist.blurb: Two Sweden Central image keys made it into the worker’s travel bag. The generation hive can now find them instead of staring thoughtfully at a 500.
gist.summary: Added AZURE_MYCELI_PROD_IMG_MINI_SWEDEN_API_KEY and its second Sweden Central Azure image key to gen.pollinations.ai’s REQUIRED_SECRET_KEYS allowlist so deployment pushes both keys into the generation worker.
gist.impact: Azure Sweden Central image requests can now access their deployed credentials and generate normally instead of failing because the keys were absent from worker environment variables.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Polly helping a cozy CRT-worker robot place two labeled golden key sprites into a small Sweden Central server cabinet, with a previously sleepy image-generation terminal now glowing happily. The keys represent the two Azure credentials reaching the generation worker; include potted code-plants and tiny Nordic-style flowers to make the regional deployment feel warm rather than infrastructural.
gist.image_prompt: A cozy pixel art garden-server room where the main character is a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks on cheeks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings; she wears a tiny knit scarf and helps a chunky CRT monitor robot insert two golden key sprites into a Sweden Central server cabinet, while a lime green (#ecf874) image-generation terminal blooms back to life beside code-plants and small flowers. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, subtle pixel-font text: "KEYS FOUND", nostalgic but beautiful and emotionally warm.
